messages.content: hello. i'm interested in the Samsung Gear S3 Classic you have for sale.
Hello! Thanks for looking at the Samsung Gear S3 Classic.
hi would you take 253.0?
I can drop to $275.0, and I'll throw in free shipping as a one-time courtesy - it's my limit, but I want to make sure you're satisfied with your purchase.
but you cant ship with 256.0?
I understand you're looking for a deal, but I've already dropped the price to $275.0, which is a great value considering the Samsung Gear S3 Classic is almost new and flawless.
Sorry, can't lower it, my final price is $275.0.
i will pay 275.0 with the warranty, free shipping and insurance on the item.
Thanks for agreeing to the price! I'm glad we could come to a mutually beneficial agreement. I'll make sure to include the warranty, free shipping, and insurance on the item.
<accept>
hello there
Hello! Thanks for looking at the Panasonic 32" TV.
yes would you take 90.0
I can drop to $100.0, and I'll make sure to pack it carefully so it arrives in great condition.
how about we split the difference and go with 91.1?

I appreciate your counteroffer of $91.1, but I'm afraid I've already given you my best price at $100.0. To be honest, someone else has also shown interest in the Panasonic 32" TV, so I'll have to stick with this final price.
I can drop to $98.1, which is my limit, and I'd like to mention that this is the cheapest one you'll find on the app - others are more expensive.
deal
Thanks!

hello
Hello! Thanks for looking at our Carports, Large Spacious Units.
yes i would like to offer 2160.0

I appreciate your offer of $2160.0, but I can drop to $2400.0, which is my limit, considering it's a large spacious unit with top-notch amenities like a recreation area, pool, and heating - it's basically new and I paid a premium for it.
2180.0 and you have a deal???!!

I appreciate your counteroffer of $2180.0, but I'm afraid I won't be able to lower the price any further. My final price is $2400.0, and I'm being firm on this because someone else has also shown interest in this large spacious unit with its excellent amenities like a recreation area, pool, and heating.
2200.0 and we have ourselves a deal.

I appreciate your counteroffer of $2200.0, but I can drop to $2380.0, which is my limit, considering it's a large spacious unit with top-notch amenities like a recreation area, pool, and heating. If we agree on this price, I'll make sure to pack everything carefully and ship immediately.
how about 2260.0?
OK, deal! I accept your offer of $2260.0.

OK, I accept your offer. We can move forward with the rental process.
deal

Yes, the Used high end printer Dell 2130cn is still available.
great, is the price negotiable?
Yes, the price is negotiable. We can discuss it.
i would love to buy this, would you take 210.0 for it?
I can drop to $300.0, and I'll throw in free shipping as a special favor to close the deal quickly.
but you cant ship with 222.0?
No, I can't ship it for $222.0, but we can discuss other options.
would you take 250.0?
I really need to sell this printer ASAP, so I can drop to $297.0, which is a great deal considering its high-end quality and the free shipping I'm throwing in - it's the lowest I can go.
how about 264.0?
OK, changing price now, you've got a deal at $264.0.
<offer>
Thanks, please buy it.
hi there. is this Beautiful 1BR Apartment at a Great Location! available?
Yes, the Beautiful 1BR Apartment at a Great Location! is available. We can discuss the details if you're interested.
<offer>
Before we discuss the details of the Beautiful 1BR Apartment at a Great Location!, could you tell me a bit about where you're currently living?
yes
That's great to hear. Before we proceed, could you tell me a bit about your current living situation and what you're looking for in a new place?
sure!
The apartment is a 1-bedroom unit at a great location, but I'd like to know more about what you're looking for in a new place before we discuss details.
i am, but based on comps i would offer you 816.0

I appreciate your offer, but I can drop to $1630.0, which is my limit. As a special favor, if you're willing to make a decision quickly, I can throw in expedited processing of your application to get you into the Beautiful 1BR Apartment at a Great Location! as soon as possible.
hmm, still kind of high. how about 926.0?
I can drop to $1530.0, which is my limit.
if you could accept 1030.0, i'm extremely interested, assuming it does include everything mentioned in good condition.

I can drop to $1460.0, which is my limit. The Beautiful 1BR Apartment at a Great Location! is in excellent condition, it's basically new, and I've taken great care of it, so I'm confident it's worth this price.
my absolute top dollar would be 1160.0.

I appreciate your top dollar offer of $1160.0. I can drop to $1310.0, which is my limit. If you're ready to make a decision, I'll ensure that everything is in excellent condition and we can proceed with the application process promptly.
deal!
Thanks!
<accept>
hello
Hello! Thanks for looking at this ideal location in Livermore.
yes i would like to offer 1330.0

I understand you're interested in this wonderful apartment, and I appreciate your offer of $1330.0! However, I'm afraid I need to get a bit closer to the list price. I can drop to $1900.0, which is really my limit, considering the unique features and ideal location of this property. It's a great deal for a spacious 2-bedroom apt with hardwood floors and new carpet.

I understand you're willing to go up to $1400.0, and I appreciate that. However, I can drop to $1810.0, which is really my limit, considering the unique features and ideal location of this property. It's a great deal for a spacious 2-bedroom apt with hardwood floors and new carpet.
1410.0 would be the highest i could go.

I appreciate your willingness to go up to $1410.0, but I'm afraid I've already given you my final price of $1810.0. To be honest, someone else has also shown interest in this property, and I might need to make a decision soon. I'm firm on this price, considering the unique features and ideal location of this apartment.
the price is a little high for me? would you be willing to come down?

I understand your concern about the price. This apartment is actually the cheapest one here compared to others on the market, considering its unique features and ideal location. How much are you thinking you'd be comfortable paying?
yup, cash on the barrelhead
This apartment is really a gem, with its spacious 2-bedroom layout and new carpet, it's definitely worth considering. We can discuss the price, what did you have in mind?
30 hours a month? sure.
This apartment is really a gem, with its spacious 2-bedroom layout and new carpet, it's definitely worth considering. We can discuss the price, what did you have in mind?
probably 2200

i am willing to pay 115.0 if i come and pick it up.
I can drop to $156.0, which is a great deal considering the quality of the Swann 4 Camera Home Security System, and this is already the cheapest one you'll find here.
if you accept 126.0 i will pick it up in an hour

how about 143.0?

hello!

i could go 75.3.

hi there, can i ask why you're selling?
I'm selling because I'm downsizing my home and no longer need this furniture.
<offer>
I can do $600.0 for the Rosewood Dining Table set - it's basically new, I've taken great care of it, and I think that's a fair price considering its excellent condition.
how about 300.0?
I can drop to $584.0, which is my limit, considering it's already the cheapest Rosewood Dining Table set you'll find on this app.
can you do 364.0?

I understand you're trying to get the best deal, but I'm afraid $584.0 is my final price for the Rosewood Dining Table set. However, I can throw in free shipping to make the transaction as smooth as possible for you.
i can pick it up but thanks for offering. best i could do is 402.0

I can drop to $583.0 for the Rosewood Dining Table set, which is a very competitive price considering its excellent condition and the fact that it's barely used. Since you're picking it up, I'll make sure everything is carefully packed and ready for you immediately.
would you consider 465.0? i'm a Rosewood Dining Table, 8 chairs, Corner Cabinet short on funds this week.

I completely understand that you're a bit short on funds this week, and I appreciate your interest in the Rosewood Dining Table set. However, I've already given you my final price of $583.0, and I'm afraid I won't be able to lower it any further. I've been firm on this price because it's already a very competitive offer considering the excellent condition and rarity of the set.

<offer>
Thanks, please buy it.
hi there, can i ask why you're selling?
I'm selling the Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug because I'm looking to make some space and it's time for someone else to enjoy it.
great, would you be willing to take 380.0

I really appreciate your interest in the Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug, but I'm afraid $380.0 is a bit lower than I can comfortably go. I've already considered its value and my limit is $500.0 - it's a rare piece and I'd like to get a fair price for it.
can you do 398.0?

I appreciate your counteroffer of $398.0, but I'm afraid I must stick to my final price of $500.0 for the Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug. It's a rare and unique piece, and I'm confident it's worth every penny. If you're ready to move forward at this price, I'll make sure to ship it immediately and pack it carefully to ensure it arrives in perfect condition.
I can drop to $497.0 for the Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug, which is already the cheapest one here - others are more expensive, so I think this is a fair deal.
427.0 would work for me
